posts.purpose: スタンプ制作データ ①
posts.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration with gentle paint bleeding and visible brush texture, pastel tones, hand-painted traditional art feel, not digital-flat. Morning yellow and summer sky blue with white — the high spirits of the first morning of summer break. Warm sparkling eyes with soft light reflection in the pupils, gentle cheerful expression radiating warmth.
[Character] Shiratama (fluffy black cat with white markings) sits upright with a small paper fan tucked beside her, eyes wide and sparkling with anticipation, tail curled up in excitement. Soft morning sunlight glows behind her. Composition: front view, bust-up, direct gaze to viewer, large copy space at top center.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『夏休み、はじまるね』in yellow-blue lettering placed at top center, not overlapping character faces; strict 1:1 square crop, completely transparent background, PNG with alpha channel, clean edge cutout with no color fringe, LINE sticker style, market-ready polish.
posts.quote: 💎 第15弾・⑮-01 | 朝 | キャラのみ（モーニングイエロー・サマースカイブルー）
